message:
feat(mission): add operator explain/report views with 18 unit tests [ft-1i2ge.5.5]

Add OperatorStatusReport types, generate_operator_report() and
format_operator_report_plain() for rich operator-comprehension views.
Includes 18 tests covering: idle/active/degraded/critical states,
event log integration, explainability, conflict section, assignment
table, JSON roundtrip, plain format, determinism (AC5), edge cases
(no agents, all rejections, retry storms, empty metrics window).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
